tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.1%), indicating impaired glucose tolerance or prediabetes. Renal function, electrolytes, and other metabolic markers are normal. Recommend lifestyle modification and follow-up for glycemic control.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
